rules.title: Rules of the Game
rules.text1: We'll give you cards with numbers on them. Each card has a set of numbers.
rules.text2: You only need to mark the cards that contain your birthday date or skip the cards that don't contain your birthday date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Not much to configure here, just some basic settings for you to customize your experience.

credits.title: Credits
credits.musicTrack: Music track: Innovating Care by Aylex

quit.title: Are you absolutely sure?
quit.description: This will close the game. Are you sure you want to leave?

scoreResult.title: Your birthday is...
scoreResult.correct: Did I guess it right? 🤔 Or are you just not paying attention?
scoreResult.incorrect: Are you even sure you were born? 💀
